name: Gilorax
ability: Choose 1 demon character. Other Giloraxes lose theirs. 1 inactive Gilorax of Demon/Townsfolk/Outsider type (who only you & minions know) starts with impaired good character & loses it if you are executed. [1 or 2 Giloraxes]
flavor:
Let me ask you an audacious question: Are you the demon?
If you ask me, well, I might be a demon… or maybe not. I might be anyone.
